3305100.name: Hollowforge Demo
3305100.description: "Step into the dark and treacherous world of Hollowforge. In this gripping demo, you'll descend into the eerie depths of a forgotten dungeon mine, where every shadow hides a threat. Face grotesque, nightmarish creatures lurking in the dark, eager to tear you apart. Will you survive the horrors waiting below, or become just another victim of the mine’s twisted past?"
3305100.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
